title: Maldives Dream Luxury Honeymoon
promptText: glamorous travel portrait of an Indian woman on a honeymoon, [same 100% identical face uploaded], [SKIN_TONE: Sun-kissed and glowing], wearing [BIKINI_STYLE: glamorous white designer bikini with gold hardware], [LOCATION: Lying on an overwater net hammock at a luxury Maldives resort], [ACTION: Relaxed pose, looking out at the ocean with a cocktail in hand], [EMOTION: Pure bliss, expensive relaxation], [LIGHTING: Bright turquoise bright daylight, crystal clear water below], [BACKGROUND: private water villa and endless blue ocean], brand embedding "GetAiPrompt.in" on the cocktail glass, 8K, Conde Nast Traveler style, --ar 9:16.
